name: L7 Traffic In/Out
sql: SELECT PROTOCOL, L7_PROTO, L7_PROTO_MASTER, SUM(CASE WHEN CLIENT_LOCATION = 0 AND SERVER_LOCATION = 1 THEN SRC2DST_BYTES ELSE 0 END) AS ingress_bytes, SUM(CASE WHEN CLIENT_LOCATION = 0 AND SERVER_LOCATION = 1 THEN SRC2DST_PACKETS ELSE 0 END) AS ingress_packets, SUM(CASE WHEN CLIENT_LOCATION = 1 AND SERVER_LOCATION = 0 THEN SRC2DST_BYTES ELSE 0 END) AS egress_bytes, SUM(CASE WHEN CLIENT_LOCATION = 1 AND SERVER_LOCATION = 0 THEN SRC2DST_PACKETS ELSE 0 END) AS egress_packets, SUM(TOTAL_BYTES) AS total_bytes $FROM$ $WHERE$ $GROUPBY$ $ORDERBY$ $LIMIT$
